zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mobberly於1377年出生在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，她的父親William de Mobberley I42歲，母親Mrs. William De Mobberly48歲。她於大約1397年與Thomas Fuller在英國素福爾可亞可利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1494年在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲波利 聖 艾德蒙達斯 凱德拉爾享年117歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲波利 聖 艾德蒙達斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mobberly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mobberly was born in 1377, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, her father, William de Mobberley I, was 42 and her mother, Mrs. William De Mobberly, was 48. She married Thomas Fuller about 1397, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1494, in Bury St Edmund's Cathedral, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, at the age of 117, and was buried in Bury St Edmund's Cathedral, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

Elle a épousé Thomas Fuller environ 1397, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mobberly 1377 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Mobberley I 42 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William De Mobberly 48. Sie hat um 1397 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England Thomas Fuller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mobberly(이)가 1377년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mobberley I(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William De Mobberly(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1397년 영국 수폴크 야스리에서 Thomas Fuller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 버이 스트 에드먼드'스 캐테드럴에서 117세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 버이 스트 에드먼드'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mobberly nasceu em 1377, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mobberley I, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William De Mobberly, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fuller aproximadamente 1397, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1494, em Bury St Edmund's Cathedral, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 117 anos, e foi sepultada em Bury St Edmund's Cathedral, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mobberly родилась в 1377 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Mobberley I было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William De Mobberly, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fuller около 1397 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1494 г. в местности бури ст эдмунд'с кэтедраль, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 117 лет и была похоронена в местности бури ст эдмунд'с кэтедраль, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Mobberly nació en 1377, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mobberley I, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mrs. William De Mobberly, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Thomas Fuller aproximadamente 1397, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1494, en Bury St Edmund's Cathedral, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 117 años, y fue sepultada en Bury St Edmund's Cathedral, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
